CONTENT.Honours: PSVEredivisie: 2023–24KNVB Cup: 2021–22Johan Cruyff Shield: 2021IndividualEredivisie Team of the Month: February 2022, April 2022,
CONTENT.Club career: On 23 June 2017, Mauro Júnior signed a five-year contract with PSV until 2022.He was sent out on a season-long loan to fellow Eredivisie club Heracles Almelo for the 2019–20 season. On 20 September 2019, he scored a brace as Heracles defeated local rivals FC Twente by a score of 3–2.On 24 September 2020, Mauro Júnior scored his side's second goal in a 5–1 away win over NŠ Mura in the third qualifying round of the UEFA Europa League.On 2 July 2021, PSV extended Mauro Júnior's contract until the summer of 2025.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the PSV Eindhoven websiteMauro Júnior at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Mauro Júnior represented Brazil at the 2015 South American Under-17 Football Championship. He came on as a substitute for Marco Túlio in the final, a 1–0 loss to Colombia.

SUMMARY: Mauro Jaqueson Júnior Ferreira dos Santos (born 6 May 1999), commonly known as Mauro Júnior, is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a left-back or winger for PSV Eindhoven.
